CVE-2021-21417.title: fluidsynth is a software synthesizer based on the SoundFont 2 spe ...
CVE-2021-21417.description: fluidsynth is a software synthesizer based on the SoundFont 2 specifications. A use after free violation was discovered in fluidsynth, that can be triggered when loading an invalid SoundFont file.
